moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Aftermath
moments.blurb: Spain defeated Argentina 1-0 in extra time to win the FIFA World Cup 2026 on Sunday, July 19, concluding the tournament co-hosted by the US, Canada, and Mexico.

angles.name: Winner's Glow
angles.copy: Still buzzing from Sunday? Spain are your 2026 World Cup champions after a nail-biting final against Argentina. What a tournament! #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Team of the Tournament
angles.copy: Beyond the final score, who were your standout players of the World Cup? So many incredible performances this summer. #Football

angles.name: Tournament Wrap-up
angles.copy: The 2026 World Cup is done and dusted! From the incredible goals to the unforgettable upsets, what's your favourite memory?

moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale concluded on Sunday, July 19, with New Zealand's Ryan Fox clinching the title.

angles.name: Golf Glory
angles.copy: Ryan Fox is the Champion Golfer of the Year! What a performance at Royal Birkdale for The 154th Open Championship.

angles.name: Birkdale's Best
angles.copy: Another incredible Open Championship at Royal Birkdale. Who was your favourite player to watch this year? #Golf

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The Love Island 2026 final is confirmed to air on Monday, July 27, at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, with just days left until the winning couple is crowned.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The Love Island final is just days away! Who are you backing to win the £50k and steal the show on Monday?

angles.name: Last Minute Drama
angles.copy: With the final looming, expect fireworks in the villa! What's the biggest twist you think could happen before Monday? #LoveIslandUK

angles.name: Viewer Predictions
angles.copy: It's almost time to crown the Love Island 2026 winners! Who's your dream couple, and who deserves to go home?

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with a diverse lineup of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Happy 20th Latitude
angles.copy: Happy 20th birthday, Latitude! Henham Park is buzzing from Thursday for another weekend of incredible music, comedy, and arts. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Suffolk's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Suffolk is getting ready to host thousands for Latitude Festival this weekend! If you're heading there, stay safe and have an amazing time. #FestivalSeason

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival takes place this weekend, July 24-26, at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire, featuring tech house, disco, bass, pop, dance anthems, and UK garage.

angles.name: Cheshire Calling
angles.copy: Together Again Festival kicks off Friday in Cheshire! Get ready for a huge weekend of tech house, disco, bass, and classic anthems.

angles.name: Dance All Weekend
angles.copy: Planning your festival weekend? Together Again at Bolesworth Castle has you covered for three days of non-stop dance, pop, and garage. #FestivalVibes

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Bow
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, held its final event at Wollaton Hall on July 18-19, after 18 years.

angles.name: Farewell Splendour
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Splendour Festival, which held its final ever event this past weekend at Wollaton Hall. An end of an era for Nottingham!

angles.name: Nottingham Memories
angles.copy: After 18 years, Splendour Festival has taken its final bow. What are your favourite memories from Nottingham's biggest summer party? #FestivalHistory

moments.title: Truck Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: Truck Festival takes over Hill Farm, Steventon, Oxfordshire from July 23-26, offering a weekend of music.

angles.name: Oxon's Indie Party
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back this weekend in Oxfordshire! Get ready for four days of great music and festival vibes at Hill Farm.

angles.name: Festival Forecast
angles.copy: Heading to Truck Festival this weekend? Pack your wellies and sunnies – it's set to be a classic British festival experience! #SummerFestival

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Recap
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival took place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music.

angles.name: Celtic Vibes
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival wrapped up over the weekend! What a fantastic celebration of music and culture in the Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Island Sounds
angles.copy: Still got the Hebridean Celtic Festival tunes in your head? Share your favourite moments from this year's incredible event! #ScottishMusic

moments.title: Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens) Turns 78
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, widely known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday today, July 21.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Cat Stevens
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens! What's your favourite of his timeless tracks?

angles.name: Peace Train at 78
angles.copy: From 'Wild World' to 'Peace Train,' Yusuf Islam's music continues to resonate. Celebrating his 78th birthday today! #YusufIslam

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder of the Eagles and successful solo artist, will celebrate his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Getting ready to wish a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon Don Henley tomorrow! What's your go-to Eagles track?

angles.name: Hotel California Drummer
angles.copy: From the Eagles to his solo hits, Don Henley is a rock legend. Celebrating his 79th birthday tomorrow! #TheEagles

moments.title: David Essex Turns 79
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex will celebrate his 79th birthday on July 23.

angles.name: Rock On David!
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only David Essex on Thursday! What's your favourite hit from the British icon?

angles.name: Gonna Make You a Star
angles.copy: From 'Gonna Make You a Star' to 'Hold Me Close,' David Essex gave us so many classics. Wishing him a very happy 79th birthday this week! #70sMusic

moments.title: Verdine White Turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, bassist and founding member of the legendary band Earth, Wind & Fire, will celebrate his 75th birthday on July 25.

angles.name: Earth, Wind & Fire Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to groove! Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75 on Saturday. What's your favourite EWF track?

angles.name: Boogie Wonderland Bassist
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Verdine White's 75th birthday this weekend! His basslines are iconic. #EarthWindAndFire

moments.title: Jim McCarty (The Yardbirds) Turns 83
moments.blurb: Jim McCarty, drummer and co-founder of the influential rock band The Yardbirds, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 25.

angles.name: Yardbirds Drummer
angles.copy: Rock 'n' roll legend Jim McCarty of The Yardbirds turns 83 on Saturday! What's your favourite Yardbirds track?

angles.name: Influential Rocker
angles.copy: From the psychedelic blues to rock anthems, Jim McCarty's drumming shaped an era. Happy 83rd birthday this weekend! #TheYardbirds

moments.title: Thurston Moore (Sonic Youth) Turns 68
moments.blurb: Thurston Moore, guitarist and co-founder of the experimental rock band Sonic Youth, will celebrate his 68th birthday on July 25.

angles.name: Alt-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to alt-rock pioneer Thurston Moore of Sonic Youth on Saturday! What's your favourite groundbreaking track from him?

angles.name: Sonic Youth's Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique sound and influence of Thurston Moore, who turns 68 this weekend. A true legend of indie rock! #SonicYouth

moments.title: Bruce Woodley (The Seekers) Turns 84
moments.blurb: Bruce Woodley, singer-songwriter and a founding member of the Australian folk-pop group The Seekers, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 25.

angles.name: Seekers' Songwriter
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to Bruce Woodley of The Seekers on Saturday! His songs are timeless.

angles.name: Georgy Girl at 84
angles.copy: From 'Georgy Girl' to countless other hits, Bruce Woodley's songwriting legacy is huge. Happy 84th this weekend! #FolkPop

moments.title: UK Summer Weather & Water Scarcity
moments.blurb: Dry weather is expected to continue across the UK this week, with temperatures in the low to mid-twenties, and several areas, particularly in the South East and South West, facing temporary hosepipe bans due to high demand.

angles.name: Summer Dry Spell
angles.copy: Another dry week ahead for much of the UK, with temperatures staying pleasant. Remember to be mindful of water usage, especially where hosepipe bans are in place.

angles.name: Water Wise
angles.copy: With dry conditions continuing and hosepipe bans affecting parts of the country, it's a good time to think about how we can all save water this summer. #WaterSaving

angles.name: Devon Water Update
angles.copy: Dry weather continues across Devon this week. With hosepipe bans active in parts of the South West, every drop counts!
